headline: Dexcom Announces Governance Enhancements Ahead of 2026 Investor Day
summary: SAN DIEGO, May 14, 2026--DexCom, Inc. (NASDAQ:DXCM) today announced key updates to its governance structure in conjunction with its upcoming 2026 Investor Day presentation that outlines a strategic and financial vision to best position the company for future growth.

headline: Dexcom to appoint two directors, revamp board committee with Elliott
summary: Medical device maker DexComsaid on Thursday it has agreed with activist investor ElliottInvestment Management to add two independent directors to thecompany's board and revamp a key board...
